explanation:
## Purpose
This file serves as the **application entry point (root HTML template)** for the frontend project. It establishes the foundational document structure, injects the Tailwind CSS utility framework, and provides the mounting point (`<div id="root">`) for the React-based component tree defined in the source TypeScript modules.

## Key Logic & Mechanisms
*   **DOM Injection Point:** Defines a singular container identified by `id="root"`, which acts as the hook for the ReactDOM hydration process.
*   **Module Loading:** Utilizes the `type="module"` script attribute to execute the primary TypeScript entry point (`/src/index.tsx`), enabling ES module resolution.
*   **Asset Configuration:** Standardizes global metadata (viewport, charset, favicon) and injects external styling via the Tailwind CSS CDN, ensuring immediate visual layout initialization upon browser parse.

## Dependencies & Side Effects
*   **External Dependencies:** 
    *   `https://cdn.tailwindcss.com`: Injects the Tailwind CSS runtime library directly into the document head.
*   **Internal Dependencies:**
    *   `/src/index.tsx`: The primary execution module containing the application logic.
    *   `/favicon.ico`: Referenced site identity asset.
*   **Side Effects:** The script execution performs immediate DOM manipulation by mounting the React application tree into the `#root` div, effectively taking over management of the document body.

## Summary
`examples/starter/index.html` acts as the static shell and orchestration layer that hydrates a React application into the DOM. It transforms a minimal HTML container into a fully functional UI runtime by bootstrapping external styles and the primary TypeScript module entry point.
